6673b1ac5cae0610f1079d73.Name: 蛙人伪装遮蔽网（黑色）
6673b1ac5cae0610f1079d73.name: Frogman Scrim Net (Black)
6673b1ac5cae0610f1079d73.description: Frogman camo veil is premium quality army scrim net scarf, a really useful large size, unlike other scrim scarves that are barely long enough to fit round your neck.Scarf measures 120cm x 150 cm with a stitched hem on two sides, manufactured from 100% cotton. Excellent as a sniper veil, helmet netting, head wrap or simply as a scarf. Ideal for all outdoor activities. Scrim scarves are designed to retain heat in cold conditions and helps keep you cool in hot conditions.

66bf757f27d0b097db0ace6d.Name: 蛙人伪装遮蔽网（白色）
66bf757f27d0b097db0ace6d.name: 蛙人伪装遮蔽网（白色）
66bf757f27d0b097db0ace6d.description: 蛙人迷彩面纱是一款高品质军用遮蔽网围巾，尺寸宽大实用，不像其他遮蔽围巾那样长度仅勉强绕过颈部。该围巾尺寸为120厘米 × 150厘米，两边带有缝边，采用100%纯棉制成。非常适合作狙击手面纱、头盔伪装网、头巾，或仅作为普通围巾使用。是各类户外活动的理想选择。遮蔽围巾可在寒冷环境中保暖，在炎热条件下也有助于保持凉爽。
